source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
Hint: Please answer the question requiring an integer answer and provide the final value, e.g., 1, 2, 3, at the end.
Question: The AC schematic of an NMOS common-source stage is shown in <image>, where part of the biasing circuits has been omitted for simplicity. For the n-channel MOSFET M, the transconductance \( g_m = 1 \text{ mA/V} \) and body effect and channel length modulation effect are to be neglected. The lower cutoff frequency (in Hz) of the circuit is approximately at
